code: import api from"./axiosInstance";;const BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL;export async function getInactiveSensors(connectionId){const response=await api.get(`${BASE_URL}/api/Sensors/connection/${connectionId}/inactive`);return response.data;}export async function inactivateSensor(sensorId){const response=await api.put(`${BASE_URL}/api/Sensors/${sensorId}/inactivate`);return response.data;}
